title: Rename device - Rename, spec chars
scenario: Verify that renaming a device with special characters correctly updates the device name on the Home screen.
steps: Click on the device's official name.
Enter special characters for the name (e.g., ? * \ ! " # $ % & ' ( ) + , - . / : ; ? @ [ ] ^ _ ` { | } ~).
expected: The device name is changed and the new name appears on the Home screen.
